title: malus × hartwigii
intro: Malus × hartwigii, also known as the Hartwig crabapple or Chinese crabapple, is a hybrid plant species within the Malus genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Malus × hartwigii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
